title: Merlin Labs - REKT 2
relevance_summary: Price manipulation through a flawed priceCalculator function

prevention.rule: Block any tx that updates the priceCalculator contract with a specific function call pattern.
prevention.trigger: PRICE_CALCULATOR_UPDATE -> call to manipulate specific asset prices

red_flags: Unusual price changes for specific assets
monitoring_rules: Monitor for unusual price changes and quick succession of price updates on the priceCalculator contract
summary: Merlin Labs suffered another $550,000 loss due to a flaw in their priceCalculator contract that allowed attackers to manipulate the price of BAND tokens. A guard could have blocked any transaction updating the priceCalculator with suspicious patterns.
